chunks.title: Moses and Aaron Confront Pharaoh
chunks.reason: The initial request for release and Pharaoh's skeptical response.

chunks.title: Pharaoh Increases the Burden
chunks.reason: The decree to remove straw and the taskmasters enforcing the quota.

chunks.title: Foremen Complain to Pharaoh and Moses
chunks.reason: The foremen's appeal to Pharaoh followed by their confrontation with Moses.

chunks.title: Moses' Complaint to Yahweh
chunks.reason: Moses questioning God regarding the increased hardship on the people.
